_meta.keyKnowledge: We investigate how performers and choreographers across cultures and times use dance elements and techniques to communicate ideas and achieve specific purposes.

_source.w: We investigate how performers and choreographers across cultures and times use dance elements and techniques to communicate ideas and achieve specific purposes.
y: Deep investigation of diverse dance practices develops our cultural literacy and artistic sophistication.
Understanding how dance achieves specific purposes across contexts informs our own artistic choices.
Studying the relationship between dance, culture and society reveals the art form's broader significance.
eg: We research how specific choreographers develop their artistic practice and communicate through movement.
We investigate the relationship between dance and broader social, political or cultural movements.
We analyse how dance traditions are maintained, adapted and transformed over time.
We compare how different cultural contexts shape the purpose and form of dance.
We study how globalisation, technology and cultural exchange have influenced contemporary dance.
We explore how dance serves different functions — artistic, social, ceremonial, political — across cultures.
